name: Ajmal V B
bio: Dedicated to building an inclusive and progressive campus environment at GEC Palakkad.
responsibilities: Leading union executive meetings
Representing students in college senate and official administrative bodies
Overseeing overall planning of campus events and student support services
vision: To establish GEC Palakkad as a hub of academic excellence, creative freedom, and active student-welfare initiatives.

name: Diya Betcy
bio: Passionate about advocacy, equality, and developing leadership skills among female engineering students.
responsibilities: Assisting the chairperson in overall governance
Directing activities for women empowerment and representing student concerns
Co-ordinating inter-departmental interactions
vision: Ensuring gender equality, active participation of female students in co-curricular fields, and a safer campus space for all.

name: Adwaith Ashok
bio: Committed to organized execution of union decisions and bridging communication between college authority and the students.
responsibilities: Managing minutes and documentation of union assemblies
Co-ordinating union budget and official communications
Organizing the annual arts and sports festivals
vision: Streamlining administrative processes for student activities and introducing digital channels for student transparency.

name: Sabari S
bio: Representing the interests of computer science students and promoting technical innovation.
responsibilities: Gathering academic feedback and representing CSE student needs to the union
Organizing departmental workshops and open-source hackathons
vision: Creating more industry-exposure opportunities and fostering a vibrant programming culture.

name: Muhammed Nihal M
bio: Enthusiastic representative focusing on electronics hands-on workshops and academic support.
responsibilities: Expressing concerns of ECE students in union meetings
Coordinating peer-to-peer tutoring for difficult core subjects
vision: Enhancing lab facilities awareness and encouraging active participation in technical symposia.

name: Aisha Fahma
bio: Representing GEC Palakkad student community at the University Union level.
responsibilities: Attending University Union general body assemblies
Representing local campus concerns to technological university authorities
Co-ordinating inter-collegiate student meets
vision: To foster a supportive space where student opinions are actively heard and acted upon.

name: Gautham Nair
bio: Advocating for campus welfare and engineering student resources at the technological university.
responsibilities: Participating in technological university union decision conferences
Liaising between university delegates and local union executives
Assisting in university-level cultural and sports coordinations
vision: Ensuring optimal and transparent utilization of student funds for welfare and campus improvements.

name: Hrudya K.
bio: Dedicated to highlighting the artistic capabilities of students and organizing Dyuthi '26.
responsibilities: Planning and executing the annual arts festival (Dyuthi)
Co-ordinating college teams for University arts competitions
Managing cultural clubs and workshops on campus
vision: To create platforms where every student feels confident to showcase their artistic talents.

name: Sreehari P.
bio: Fostering literature, thoughts, and artistic expressions in the annual union magazine.
responsibilities: Editing and compiling content for the college magazine
Forming the student editorial board
Co-ordinating publication and print cycles
vision: To document the campus zeitgeist through bold and creative literary expression.

name: Alan Joseph
bio: Promoting sportsmanship, physical fitness, and inter-collegiate tournament victories.
responsibilities: Organizing the annual sports meet and inter-department games
Procuring and maintaining sports goods for the gym and grounds
Co-ordinating college teams for technological university events
vision: Fostering a healthy, active lifestyle and securing victory cups for GEC Palakkad.

name: Jithin Dev
bio: Working to address class facility queries and project lab extensions for electrical students.
responsibilities: Gathering department complaints
Representing EEE student issues in union panels
vision: Enhance hands-on electrical workshops and safety setups.

name: Akhil Raj
bio: Representing ME department students and advocating for garage and lab updates.
responsibilities: Sharing ME mechanical concerns
Co-ordinating departmental technical seminars
vision: Provide industry-relevant tool exposures and industrial visits.

name: Devika M.
bio: Passionate about structural engineering workshops and representing Civil department concerns.
responsibilities: Interfacing between CE students and the union
Organizing field surveying and drafting modules
vision: Promote sustainable campus civil designs and site visit plans.

name: Rohith K.
bio: Bridging postgraduate PG research needs with the campus college union.
responsibilities: Co-ordinating lab access timings for PG researchers
Providing academic assistance and thesis guidelines
vision: Enhancing researcher representation and digital library hours.

name: Ananya Sen
bio: Working to improve female student welfare and support desks on campus.
responsibilities: Resolving ladies hostel infrastructure issues
Conducting women health, self-defense, and tech seminars
vision: Equal opportunities, campus safety, and leadership inclusion for all female engineers.

name: Farha Sherin
bio: Committed to fostering a welcoming environment and raising female student issues.
responsibilities: Managing ladies amenity center requirements
Co-ordinating hostel sports meets
vision: A friendly campus environment where every voice receives equal attention.

name: Vignesh A.
bio: Ensuring SC/ST student benefits, scholarships, and academic support desks are accessible.
responsibilities: Tracking state and university scholarship delays
Providing textbook loans and digital study resources
vision: Absolute equal representation and smooth financial aid disbursement for marginalized students.
